title: Unable to reset password
description: Customer clicks 'Forgot Password' but never receives the reset email, even after multiple attempts.

title: App crashes on login
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after entering valid credentials on Android 14 devices.

title: Invoice shows incorrect tax amount
description: The generated invoice for June applies a 15% tax rate instead of the contracted 10% rate.

title: Feature request: dark mode
description: Customer is requesting a dark mode theme option for the web dashboard.

title: Export to CSV fails silently
description: Clicking the 'Export to CSV' button does nothing; no file is downloaded and no error message appears.

title: Two-factor auth. not sending codes
description: SMS codes for 2FA are delayed by over 20 minutes, locking customers out of their accounts temporarily.

title: Billing charged twice
description: Customer was charged twice for the same monthly subscription and is requesting a refund for the duplicate charge.

title: API returning 500 errors
description: The /orders endpoint returns a 500 error roughly 1 in every 20 requests during peak hours.

title: Cannot upload profile picture
description: Uploading a JPEG profile picture larger than 2MB fails with a generic 'Upload failed' message.

title: Request to merge duplicate accounts
description: Customer accidentally created two accounts with different emails and wants them merged into one.

title: Notification emails going to spam
description: Customers report that all transactional emails are being routed to their spam folder by Gmail.

title: Dashboard loading time too slow
description: The analytics dashboard takes over 15 seconds to load for accounts with more than 10,000 records.
